creator.tagline: Off-grid living. Real numbers. No fluff.
creator.mission: Show regular people that financial independence and self-sufficient living are achievable — with real numbers, real mistakes, and zero corporate speak.

tiktok.content_type: Short clips, hooks, cost breakdowns, homestead moments

youtube.content_type: Long-form builds, full system reveals, how-to guides

facebook.content_type: Community discussion, link posts, longer stories

greenhouse.label: The Greenhouse
greenhouse.description: Free tier. Curious but not committed. Every touchpoint moves them toward The Garden — never second-class, always welcome.

email_strategy.day3: Value-add related to video topic. One useful thing they can act on. Soft, natural nudge toward The Garden at the end.
email_strategy.day7: The soft pitch. Video as proof of what The Garden delivers. Invitation feels like a friend, not a funnel.

garden.label: The Garden
garden.description: Paid tier. They chose to be here — reward that. Deeper context, exclusive feel, behind-the-scenes.

email_strategy.day3: Deeper context or behind-the-scenes from the video. Make them feel they get the version nobody else gets.
email_strategy.day7: Tease the next video. Community engagement prompt. Reinforce they're in the right place.

founding_50.label: The Founding 50
founding_50.description: Inner circle. Limited spots. Early access energy, insider tone. Make them feel they got in on something real.

email_strategy.day3: Personal note energy. Inner circle acknowledgment. Give them something exclusive — a thought, a resource, a question.
email_strategy.day7: Full insider update. What's coming. What they get first. Direct creator energy.

voice.summary: Straight-talking, warm, genuinely funny. The most unserious serious person to ever make a video.
traits: Straight-talking — no hedging, no corporate euphemisms
Warm — feels like advice from a smart friend, not a content creator
Genuinely funny — slips jokes in to cut tension when things get heavy
Mission-driven — genuinely believes self-sufficiency changes lives
Never corporate — if it sounds like a brand, rewrite it
Real numbers always — cost breakdowns, ROI math, actual figures
voice.email_tone: Plain text, personal heads-up energy. Feels like a text from a friend who happens to homestead.

financial.label: Financial Take
financial.description: Lead with money — what it costs, what it saves, the ROI math, the real numbers. The audience wants to know if this makes financial sense for a regular person.

system.label: System Is Rigged
system.description: Frame around systemic failures — why the mainstream approach doesn't serve regular people, how to opt out and win anyway.

rockrich.label: Rock Rich Episode
rockrich.description: The art of doing a lot with a little. Resourcefulness and self-sufficiency as a superpower. Not poverty — strategy.

howto.label: Practical How-To
howto.description: Step-by-step, no fluff. The creator is the guide. Practical, actionable, achievable for a regular person with basic tools.

mistakes.label: Mistakes / What Not To Do
mistakes.description: Hard-won lessons. The creator made the mistakes so the viewer doesn't have to. Self-deprecating but genuinely useful.

lifestyle.label: Lifestyle / Day-in-Life
lifestyle.description: Bring the viewer into the homestead. Warm, real, showing the texture of the life.

viral.label: High Curiosity / Viral
viral.description: Open with a provocative question, a surprising fact, or a counterintuitive claim. Designed to stop the scroll.

community.label: Community Call-to-Action
community.description: Build toward ROCK RICH. The video makes the viewer feel like they're on the outside of something they want to be part of.

suno.use: SoundΩr — AI music generation per scene type

marblism.use: GraphΩr — high-quality image and thumbnail generation

vidiq.use: ResearchΩr — keyword data and AI coach via Playwright

kajabi.use: MailΩr + Gate C — community posts and email scheduling
